name: Daedalus Special Acquisition Corp.
business: We are a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We have not selected any business combination target. Our initial focus will be on the Consumer AI sector.

exposures.sentence: Our initial focus will be on the Consumer AI sector.
Our strategy is to capitalize on the largest technological platform shift of our generation: consumer artificial intelligence (AI).

Leveraging our team's proven playbook in building and consolidating mobile-first businesses, we aim to establish a platform that becomes the natural consolidator in this fragmented, hyper-growth market.

catalysts.event: Consummation of initial public offering (IPO) including partial exercise of over-allotment option
catalysts.sentence: On December 10, 2025, we consummated our IPO of 25,000,000 units, including 2,500,000 units issued pursuant to the partial exercise by the underwriters of their over-allotment option.

catalysts.event: Announcement of separate trading of Class A ordinary shares and warrants
catalysts.sentence: On January 27, 2026, the Company announced that, on January 29, 2026, the holders of the Company's units may elect to separately trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants included in the units.

tamClaims.claim: Mobile consumer app revenues (excluding gaming) grew from $3.5 billion in 2014 to $69.2 billion in 2023, with continued strong growth projected.
tamClaims.sentence: mobile consumer app revenues (excluding gaming) grew from $3.5 billion in 2014 to $69.2 billion in 2023, with continued strong growth projected.

tamClaims.claim: Generative AI app downloads alone have surged from near zero in 2021 to over 1.5 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Generative AI app downloads alone have surged from near zero in 2021 to over 1.5 billion in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: AI-powered consumer apps generate revenue predominantly through recurring subscriptions, with industry benchmarks showing margins above 20% and growth rates exceeding 100% annually for leading players.
tamClaims.sentence: AI-powered consumer apps generate revenue predominantly through recurring subscriptions, with industry benchmarks showing margins above 20% and growth rates exceeding 100% annually for leading players.
